Figure 3: Motivation for our design. (a) The runtime comparison between a frame attention layer and a global attention layer during a single forward pass on 7-Scenes. (b) A visualization of an average global attention map in the alternating attention block. (c) An illustration of highly activated patch tokens (top 5% of activations across all frames) across layers and frames in global attention. (d) The runtime comparison between an alternating attention block and an adaptive alternating attention block during a single forward pass. Please refer to the supplementary material for enlarged visualizations.

Figure 5: Supplementary visualization of the motivation for the proposed adaptive alternating attention (Enlarged visualizations). (a) A visualization of an average global attention map in the alternating attention block. (b) An illustration of highly activated patch tokens of different frames in global attention.
